name: Double Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9"x13" pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat sugar, margarine or butter, vanilla, and eggs until blended.
4. Increase speed to high and beat until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
5. Reduce speed to low and add flour, sour cream, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; beat until blended, constantly scraping the bowl.
6. Increase speed to medium and beat for 1 minute, occasionally scraping the bowl.
7. With a spatula, fold in zucchini, chocolate pieces, and nuts. The batter will be thick.
8. Spread batter evenly in the pan.
9. Bake for 40-45 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool cake in the pan on a wire rack.
11. To serve, sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
